overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in a long coat and hat walking through a snowy, foggy wilderness trail at night. The character passes stone walls and gas lamps along the path, stops briefly at a wooden signpost, and continues walking as the sky gradually lightens with dawn colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail between stone retaining walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered trail flanked by stone walls and periodic gas lamps

entered.detail: snow-covered stone retaining wall running along the right side of the trail
low stone wall covered in snow on the left side of the path
cast iron lamp post with warm yellow light illuminating the snow
tall pine trees visible through the fog in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow snowy trail enclosed by stone walls on both sides. Gas lamps provide warm pools of light against the blue foggy darkness, while evergreen trees loom in the misty background.

events.description: character stops walking and pauses at the wooden signpost to look around
character moves around the signpost, temporarily blocking the view of the path ahead

agents.ego_description: pausing at the trail intersection to examine the signpost and survey the surroundings

entered.detail: wooden signpost with multiple directional signs pointing to various locations
diagonal wooden beam supporting the signpost structure

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a wooden signpost marking a trail intersection. The camera pans slightly as the character looks around, with the left stone wall now behind and the signpost dominating the center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy trail with distant mountain views

events.description: sky lightens revealing purple and orange dawn colors through the fog

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the landscape opens up, revealing the dawn sky and distant mountains

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence running along the left side of the open field
snow-capped mountain range visible through the fog as the sky lightens
colorful dawn sky with purple and pink hues breaking through the night fog

segments.scene_description: The character resumes walking as the trail opens into a wider landscape. The stone wall recedes to the right while a wooden fence appears on the left. The foggy sky gradually reveals purple and orange dawn colors, and distant mountains become visible through the mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy wilderness trail that transforms from a claustrophobic, foggy night into an expansive dawn landscape. It begins with the character walking through a narrow path enclosed by stone walls, where warm pools of light from gas lamps contrast against the deep blue mist and looming evergreen trees. As the character reaches a wooden signpost at a trail intersection, the camera pans slightly to capture the character pausing to survey the surroundings. The scene then opens up as the character resumes walking, with the stone walls receding to the right and a wooden fence appearing on the left. Finally, the foggy sky shifts into vibrant purple and orange dawn colors, revealing distant mountains as the terrain expands into a wide, open vista.
